title: Premenstrual Dysphoric Disorder (PMDD)
content: In most menstrual cycles, at least 5 symptoms must be present in the final week before the onset of menses, start to improve within a few days after the onset of menses, and become minimal or absent in the week postmenses: Affective lability, irritability, depressed mood, anxiety, decreased interest, difficulty concentrating, lethargy.
